subject: [FF7] How to find out which map module is used?

posts.author: Raziel80
posts.subject: [FF7] How to find out which map module is used?
posts.body_text: How to find out which map module is used during gameplay: World map or Field map or Battle? Interested in both versions PC and PSX. In theory, both versions use the same method.
posts.body_html: How to find out which map module is used during gameplay: World map or Field map or Battle? Interested in both versions PC and PSX. In theory, both versions use the same method.

posts.author: Akari
posts.subject: Re: [FF7] How to find out which map module is used?
posts.body_text:
On PSX in english version used variable 0x8009c560
Code:
[Select]
1 - field.
2 - battle.
3 - world map.
4 - battle.
5 - menu.
6 - highway.
7 - chocobo.
8 - snowboard.
9 - condor.
a - submarine.
b - jet.
c - disc change.
d - menu.
e - snowboard2.
10 - ???
posts.body_html:

1 - field.

3 - world map.

5 - menu.

7 - chocobo.
8 - snowboard.
9 - condor.
a - submarine.
b - jet.
c - disc change.
d - menu.
e - snowboard2.
10 - ???

posts.subject: Re: [FF7] How to find out which map module is used?
posts.body_html: Thank you very much.

posts.author: mav
posts.subject: Re: [FF7] How to find out which map module is used?
posts.body_text: On PC it's at 0xCBF9DC and the list of possible values is the same as the one Akari shared.
posts.body_html: On PC it's at 0xCBF9DC and the list of possible values is the same as the one Akari shared.

posts.author: Raziel80
posts.subject: Re: [FF7] How to find out which map module is used?
posts.body_text:
Quote from: mav on 2025-09-13 19:23:09
the list of possible values is the same as the one Akari shared.
Thanks. I want to clarify the question. What variable would you recommend using in a trainer in order to know where the player is located now: on the World map, on the Field map or in Battle? Is this map module variable most suitable for this purpose?
